verses.text: A masa penin kong gennop thu in: Mi khempeuh-a' dingin Pasian tungah ngetna, thungetna, thumna leh lungdam kohna na neih ding uh ahi hi
Eite nuamtakin omthei-in, biakna lungsim nei-in a kilawm takin i nuntak theihna dingin kumpite leh uliante-a' dingin thu na ngetsak un
Hih bang gamtatnate pen eite hong Hon Pasian' muhna-ah a hoih a kilawm thu ahi hi
Mi khempeuh in hotkhiatna ngahin, thuman a theihkim ding Pasian in deih hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian khat bek om a, Pasian leh mite a hong kilemsak kik thei Khrih Jesuh khat bek om hi
Mi khempeuh a tankhia dingin tua Jesuh hong kipiatawm a, a hun lian laitakin a hong kipiakna pen Pasian in mi khempeuh a hotkhiat nopna thu a kilatna ahi hi
Hih ka gen thu pen zuau a hilo, thu taktak a gen ka hi a, Gentail mite lakah upna thu leh hih thuman a gen dingin sawltak na semin thu a hilh dingin kei a hong kisawl ahi hi
Mun khempeuhah a om pasal khempeuh in kuamah tawh kitotna leh lungsim kinopmawhna nei hetloin, lungsim siangtho tawh a khut uh lamin thu a nget ding uh ka deih hi
Tua mah bangin numeite zong a kilawm a kituak bekin kizemin kipuahin, sam khawng a uanglua-in bawlloin, a khengvalin kizepna a tuamtuamte zangloin
biakna lungsim neite-a' dingin a kilawm ahih mah bangin gamtat hoih a neihding uh ka deih hi
Numeite in gamdai takin kiniamkhiatna tawh thu ngai-in a sin ding uh ahi hi
Numeite in pasalte tungah aana nei-in thu a hilh ding ka phalkei hi. Gamdai takin a om ding uh ahi hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh a masa-in Adam kipiangsak a, tua ciangin Eve kipiangsak pan hi
Adam in khemna thuak masalo a, numei in thuakin a khial masa a suak hi
Ahi zongin numei in a kilawm a kituakin upna, itna leh siangthona thu-ah kiptakin a om nak leh nausuah gimna sihpihlo ding hi.
